---
title: "Week 1: Introduction & Course Overview"
#subtitle: "March 31, 2026"
date: "March 31, 2026"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: bootstrap
    highlight: pygments
    css: week-styles.css
    toc: false
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

> Getting oriented: what we'll cover and why it matters.

---

## Overview

This week we set the foundation for the course. We'll introduce the core concepts and review the syllabus.

---

## Lecture Materials

### Slides

🖥 Full slide deck from lecture.

[View and Download PDF](https://ucsb.box.com/s/n2aqn5vdjv8y4eojexdpmjkpwpu79kvp){.btn .btn-primary} &nbsp; 

---

## 📂 Assignments

### Spring Break Story <span class="badge badge-danger">Participation</span>

**Due: Today at the end of class**

[Submission Folder](https://ucsb.app.box.com/f/9ca88f5dbb114e2c85479079c3832f0c){.btn .btn-default}

---
